full_text:
|[pic] |Anastasiya Chernenko |
| |Laboratory Coordinator |
| |Research Programs Unit |
| |Research Program in Systems Oncology |
| |Biomedicum Helsinki, 3rd floor, room B317a |
| |University of Helsinki |
| |P.O.B. 63 (Haartmaninkatu 8) |
| |FI-00014, Helsinki, Finland |


 USDA Statement

Place & Date: Helsinki 3. Mar. 2021


Shipper: Anastasiya Chernenko
 University of Helsinki
 Research Program in Systems Oncology
 Haartmaninkatu 8, Biomedicum Helsinki
 00290 Helsinki
 Finland
 Telephone: +358505763950


Consignee: Daniel Campton
 RareCyte, Inc.
 2601 Fourth Ave, Suite 500
 Seattle, WA 98121, USA

Telephone: +1 855 727 3298


Contents: Exempt human tissue paraffin sections on glass slides in
plastic container. Samples were collected by sender, stored at room
temperature. Non-infectious, non-contagious, non-hazardous, non-toxic.
Being supplied free of charge with no commercial transaction.


Quantity: 10 pcs.


 All substances are for laboratory testing only in research
collaboration.

 The material was not obtained from humans or non-human
 primates that have been inoculated with or exposed to any
 livestock or poultry disease agents exotic to the United
 States.

Sincerely,


____________________________________
Anastasiya Chernenko, Laboratory Coordinator
University of Helsinki, Haartmaninkatu 8,
Biomedicum, room B317a, 00290 Helsinki, FINLAND
